round_id.description: RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round.

kind.description: Kind is the review kind for the round.

updated_at.description: UpdatedAt is the timestamp of the most recent ledger update.

oneOf.description: Slots lists the current state of every manifest slot.

slots.description: Slots lists the current state of every manifest slot.

ReviewLedger.description: ReviewLedger is the command-owned ledger artifact tracking submission status for a review round.

name.description: Name is the human-readable dimension label.

slot.description: Slot is the stable slot identifier.

status.description: Status is the current submission status for the slot.

submission_path.description: SubmissionPath is the path where the slot submission should exist.

submitted_at.description: SubmittedAt is the submission timestamp when the slot has been submitted.

ReviewLedgerSlot.description: ReviewLedgerSlot records the current state for one reviewer slot in the ledger.

title: Review ledger artifact
description: Command-owned review ledger artifact for one review round.
